generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for horizontal movement of the gantry crane, controlled via Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for vertical movement of the crane hoist, controlled via Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic device positioned at the end of the hoist for picking up and releasing small pucks representing containers"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system that monitors swing angle encoder, controls electromagnet, and interfaces with anemometer for environmental sensing"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the swinging motion of the crane hoist to enable trajectory correction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor providing real-time environmental data for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance MotorControllerFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Feedback interface from TMC4671-Eval motor controllers providing position and speed data for both cart and hoist motors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData, CraneTrajectoryData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerFeedback
]

instance CraneTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerFeedback
]

instance ElectromagnetControlData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoController
]

instance SystemStatusEvents : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of the gantry crane system created in Fusion360 for visualization and simulation purposes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation with minimal residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Virtual representation of the crane and its controllers for validation and testing of real-world operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing continuous crane state and sensor data for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, MotorPositionData, CraneTrajectoryData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance SystemEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia/Capella system engineering model used for teaching and documentation of the crane's architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming environment with gantrylib module for trajectory generation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for storing and querying continuous sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization platform for real-time and historical performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker enabling modular communication between services"
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization platform for deploying and managing services"
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fusion360 CAD software used for creating and managing 3D models of the crane"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous logging of crane state and sensor data to TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePerformanceInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical visualization of crane performance and sensor data through Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematic modeling service generating optimal trajectories with minimal residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Virtual simulation of crane trajectories and controllers for validation and testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationVerificationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of simulated and executed trajectories to detect faults or deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of time-series classification techniques to identify operational faults"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CranePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical analysis of crane performance metrics stored in TimescaleDB"
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operational parameters through Grafana dashboards"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of optimal trajectories to reduce swinging and improve efficiency"
]

instance ValidationVerificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification results comparing simulated and executed trajectories"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early warning system for operational faults detected through time-series analysis"
]

instance DataAvailabilityAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic data persistence and retrieval from TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of generated optimal trajectories by the crane control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TeachingVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic visualization of crane operations for educational purposes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TeachingSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Simulation environment for demonstrating digital twin concepts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemHealthAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic health monitoring and status reporting of the crane system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated maintenance suggestions based on fault detection analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment where the gantry crane system operates"
    base:contains CraneSystem
]

instance CraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Complete lab-scale gantry crane system including physical components and sensors"
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin influences the physical system through:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation**: The Trajectory Generator Service computes and sends optimized movement trajectories to the Control Application.
  - **Simulation feedback**: The Simulation Service provides virtual trajectory simulations to the Continuous Validation Service, which compares them with real-world data to detect anomalies.
  - **Operator commands**: The Human Machine Interface (HMI) allows operators to send control commands to the Control Application, which then executes them on the physical crane."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time continuous operation** with the following specifics:
  - **Data Logging**: State data is logged at high frequency (exact rate not specified but implied to be sub-second, given the use of TimescaleDB for time-series data).
  - **Trajectory Execution**: Physical movements are controlled in real-time, with trajectory generation and validation occurring concurrently. The system supports **per-motor-step control** (implied by stepper motor usage) and **sub-second response times** for operator commands and sensor feedback.
  - **Validation**: Continuous validation compares real-time sensor data with simulated trajectories, with thresholds and metrics updated dynamically during operation. The system does not specify exact latency requirements but emphasizes real-time synchronization for validation and fault detection."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Layer**: Crane hardware, Arduino, and motor controllers.
  - **Data Layer**: TimescaleDB database storing sensor and operational data.
  - **Service Layer**: Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, and MQTT Broker services.
  - **Interface Layer**: Human Machine Interface (Grafana dashboard) and Control Application.
  - **Orchestration**: Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; Python modules for crane control and services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin primarily represents the **as-operated** phase of the crane, capturing real-time and historical operational data. It also includes **as-designed** representations via **CAD models** (Fusion360) and **kinematic models** for trajectory planning. There is no explicit **as-manufactured** representation (e.g., calibration data or tolerances) in the current implementation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: Real-time comparison of simulated and executed trajectories with configurable thresholds for anomalies.
  - **Model Validation**: Reuse of existing model validation techniques to validate kinematic and simulation models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Confidence bounds (simulated upper/lower bounds) for trajectory predictions.
  - **Verification**: Testing of digital twin services (e.g., trajectory generation, fault detection) against real-world data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin includes:
  - **Network Protocols**: MQTT for inter-service communication and data streaming.
  - **Data Transmission**: Real-time sensor data and control signals via Arduino and motor controllers.
  - **Architecture**: Decoupled design with MQTT broker facilitating communication between services and the physical system."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed on:
  - **Local Machine**: All Python services and the gantrylib module run on a personal computer.
  - **Containerization**: Docker containers for TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard.
  - **Deployment**: Docker Compose for easy setup and teardown of the digital twin infrastructure."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited but includes:
  - **External Systems**: Potential integration with harbor management systems (e.g., container tracking) in teaching extensions.
  - **Simulation Tools**: Virtual commissioning could connect to external simulation environments (not implemented in this exemplar)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The exemplar is licensed under **MIT**, making the code and documentation openly available. However, the document does not specify:
  - Ownership of operational data (e.g., whether logged crane data belongs to the operator or the DT service provider).
  - Privacy protocols (e.g., anonymization, access controls) for sensitive data.
  - Data retention policies or compliance with regulations (e.g., GDPR)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar follows:
  - **No Dedicated Digital Twin Standards**: Uses ad-hoc approaches with common technologies (PostgreSQL, MQTT, Docker).
  - **CAD Standards**: Fusion360 for 3D modeling.
  - **Simulation Standards**: Kinematic modeling aligned with common robotics practices."
]
